spec_match.rationale: Excellent side-by-side textareas demonstrating the HTML attribute toggle and checking feature-support via the IDL HTMLElement.prototype.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive, providing misspelling chips that instantly inject text to test OS-level corrections, plus live IDL property feedback labels.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns perfectly with the core autocorrect introduction and use cases.

edge_cases.rationale: Clearly documents that OS-level autocorrection varies by platform settings and devices.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link and MDN links.

design_system.rationale: Utilizes the shared design layout, responsive CSS grids, and proper WCAG AA contrasting elements.

summary: The autocorrect-demo is a highly compliant and interactive side-by-side demonstration of the autocorrect attribute and DOM property, complete with misspelling click chips.
